raw_text:
79. Simulation Engineer (Tooling & Die Analysis)

Job Summary  
Uses simulation software to analyz e tooling performance, material flow, and stress to 
optimize designs before manufacturing.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Perform simulation for dies, molds, and tooling  
• Analyze stress, strain, and material flow  
• Optimize tool design and performance  
• Reduce trial -and-error in production  
• Generate simulation reports  
• Support design and development teams  
Required Skills  
• Simulation software (ANSYS, Abaqus, AutoForm, Moldflow)  
• Strong understanding of material behavior  
• Analytical and problem -solving skil ls  
• Knowledge of tooling processes  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production  
Experience  
• 3–7 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹45,000 – ₹1,00,000 per month
